datasets.name: ds_stop_dwell_summary
datasets.displayName: Stop Dwell Summary — sched vs actual (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  f.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id) AS stop_name,
  f.route_id,
  f.service_date,
  f.direction_id,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS observation_count,
  ROUND(AVG(f.scheduled_dwell_seconds), 1)              AS avg_scheduled_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(f.actual_dwell_seconds), 1)                 AS avg_actual_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(f.dwell_delta_seconds), 1)                  AS avg_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.dwell_delta_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.actual_dwell_seconds, 0.5), 1) AS p50_actual_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.actual_dwell_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_actual_sec
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact f
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON f.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE f.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND f.actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY f.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id), f.route_id, f.service_date, f.direction_id
HAVING observation_count >= 3
ORDER BY avg_delta_sec DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: ds_top_dwell_stops
datasets.query:
SELECT
  f.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id) AS stop_name,
  f.route_id,
  f.service_date,
  ROUND(AVG(f.dwell_delta_seconds), 1)                     AS avg_dwell_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(f.actual_dwell_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_actual_sec,
  COUNT(*)                                                 AS observations
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact f
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON f.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE f.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND f.actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
  AND f.dwell_delta_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY f.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, f.stop_id), f.route_id, f.service_date
HAVING observations >= 3
ORDER BY avg_dwell_delta_sec DESC
LIMIT 30

datasets.name: ds_inferred_dwell_summary
datasets.query:
SELECT
  i.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id) AS stop_name,
  i.route_id,
  i.service_date,
  COUNT(DISTINCT i.service_date)                        AS days_observed,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS events,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.5), 0)    AS p50_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.9), 0)    AS p90_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(AVG(i.dwell_seconds), 1)                       AS avg_dwell_sec,
  MAX(i.dwell_seconds)                                 AS max_dwell_sec
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred i
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON i.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE i.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY i.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id), i.route_id, i.service_date
HAVING events >= 3
ORDER BY p90_dwell_sec DESC
LIMIT 100

datasets.name: ds_dwell_by_route
datasets.displayName: Avg Dwell Delta by Route (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  service_date,
  direction_id,
  ROUND(AVG(dwell_delta_seconds), 1)                     AS avg_dwell_delta_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(actual_dwell_seconds, 0.9), 1) AS p90_actual_sec,
  SUM(CASE WHEN actual_dwell_seconds > 120 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stops_over_2min,
  COUNT(*)                                               AS total_stops
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY route_id, service_date, direction_id
ORDER BY avg_dwell_delta_sec DESC

datasets.name: ds_dwell_distribution
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  service_date,
  CASE
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 15  THEN '1_fast (0-15s)'
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 30  THEN '2_normal (15-30s)'
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 60  THEN '3_slow (30-60s)'
    WHEN actual_dwell_seconds < 120 THEN '4_high_pax (60-120s)'
    ELSE '5_outlier (120s+)'
  END                                                   AS dwell_bucket,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS stop_events,
  ROUND(COUNT(*) * 100.0 / SUM(COUNT(*)) OVER (PARTITION BY route_id, service_date), 1) AS pct_of_total
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_fact
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND actual_dwell_seconds IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY route_id, service_date, dwell_bucket
ORDER BY route_id, dwell_bucket

datasets.name: ds_inferred_heatmap_route
datasets.displayName: VP-Inferred Dwell — Route × Hour of Day (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  service_date,
  MOD(HOUR(TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, -7, inferred_arrival_ts)) + 24, 24) AS phoenix_hour,
  ROUND(AVG(dwell_seconds), 0)                         AS avg_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(dwell_seconds, 0.9), 0)      AS p90_dwell_sec,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS observations
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY route_id, service_date, MOD(HOUR(TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, -7, inferred_arrival_ts)) + 24, 24)
HAVING observations >= 3
ORDER BY route_id, phoenix_hour

datasets.name: ds_inferred_heatmap_stop
datasets.displayName: VP-Inferred Dwell — Top Stops × Hour of Day (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
WITH top_stops AS (
  SELECT stop_id
  FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred
  WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  GROUP BY stop_id
  HAVING AVG(dwell_seconds) >= 60
  ORDER BY AVG(dwell_seconds) DESC
  LIMIT 40
)
SELECT
  i.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id)                      AS stop_name,
  i.route_id,
  i.service_date,
  MOD(HOUR(TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, -7, i.inferred_arrival_ts)) + 24, 24) AS phoenix_hour,
  ROUND(AVG(i.dwell_seconds), 0)                        AS avg_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.9), 0)    AS p90_dwell_sec,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS observations
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred i
INNER JOIN top_stops ts ON i.stop_id = ts.stop_id
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON i.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE i.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
GROUP BY i.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id), i.route_id, i.service_date,
  MOD(HOUR(TIMESTAMPADD(HOUR, -7, i.inferred_arrival_ts)) + 24, 24)
HAVING observations >= 2
ORDER BY stop_name, phoenix_hour

datasets.name: ds_inferred_dwell_trend
datasets.query:
SELECT
  route_id,
  service_date,
  ROUND(AVG(dwell_seconds), 0)                         AS avg_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(dwell_seconds, 0.5), 0)      AS p50_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(dwell_seconds, 0.9), 0)      AS p90_dwell_sec,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS events
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred
WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 30 DAYS
GROUP BY route_id, service_date
ORDER BY service_date, route_id

datasets.name: ds_route_stop_profile
datasets.displayName: Route Stop Profile — Avg Dwell by Stop Sequence (last 7 days)
datasets.query:
WITH trip_bounds AS (
  SELECT trip_id,
    MIN(stop_sequence) AS first_seq,
    MAX(stop_sequence) AS last_seq
  FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred
  WHERE service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  GROUP BY trip_id
)
SELECT
  i.route_id,
  i.direction_id,
  i.service_date,
  i.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id)                      AS stop_name,
  MIN(i.stop_sequence)                                  AS stop_sequence,
  COUNT(*)                                              AS observations,
  ROUND(AVG(i.dwell_seconds), 0)                        AS avg_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.5), 0)    AS p50_dwell_sec,
  ROUND(PERCENTILE_APPROX(i.dwell_seconds, 0.9), 0)    AS p90_dwell_sec,
  MAX(i.dwell_seconds)                                  AS max_dwell_sec
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred i
INNER JOIN trip_bounds tb ON i.trip_id = tb.trip_id
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON i.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE i.service_date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 7 DAYS
  AND i.stop_sequence != tb.first_seq
  AND i.stop_sequence != tb.last_seq
GROUP BY i.route_id, i.direction_id, i.service_date, i.stop_id, COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id)
HAVING observations >= 3
ORDER BY i.route_id, i.direction_id, MIN(i.stop_sequence)

datasets.name: ds_trip_stop_heatmap
datasets.query:
WITH trip_bounds AS (
  SELECT trip_id,
    MIN(stop_sequence) AS first_seq,
    MAX(stop_sequence) AS last_seq
  FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred
  WHERE service_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAYS
  GROUP BY trip_id
)
SELECT
  i.route_id,
  i.direction_id,
  i.service_date,
  i.trip_id,
  i.stop_sequence,
  i.stop_id,
  COALESCE(s.stop_name, i.stop_id)                      AS stop_name,
  i.dwell_seconds
FROM tabular.dataexpert.gold_stop_dwell_inferred i
INNER JOIN trip_bounds tb ON i.trip_id = tb.trip_id
LEFT JOIN tabular.dataexpert.silver_dim_stop s ON i.stop_id = s.stop_id
WHERE i.service_date = CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL 1 DAYS
  AND i.stop_sequence != tb.first_seq
  AND i.stop_sequence != tb.last_seq
ORDER BY i.route_id, i.direction_id, i.trip_id, i.stop_sequence

widget.name: txt_dwell_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## Stop Dwell Analysis

Benchmarks (TCQSM/Valley Metro): fast=15s, normal=30s, high-pax=45–60s, wheelchair=120s. Delta = actual − scheduled.

**Global filters:** Route ID → Multiple values, Service Date → Date range. Link both filters to all datasets: `ds_stop_dwell_summary`, `ds_top_dwell_stops`, `ds_inferred_dwell_summary`, `ds_dwell_by_route`, `ds_dwell_distribution`, `ds_inferred_heatmap_route`, `ds_inferred_heatmap_stop`, `ds_inferred_dwell_trend`. All datasets carry route_id and service_date.

**AVG aggregation reminders:** For percentage Y-axes (pct_of_total), set Lakeview chart aggregation to AVG, not SUM, to avoid double-counting across route/date rows.

**Chart Y axis:** Use `stop_name` instead of `stop_id` for all stop-level bar charts.

**Note:** High dwell values at Route A/ALEX terminals are expected layover behavior.

**Suggested visualizations:**
- `ds_dwell_distribution` → Pie or bar: dimension=`dwell_bucket`, measure=`stop_events`
- `ds_dwell_by_route` → Bar: x=`route_id`, y=`avg_dwell_delta_sec` + `p90_actual_sec`
- `ds_top_dwell_stops` → Bar: x=`stop_name`, y=`avg_dwell_delta_sec`
- `ds_stop_dwell_summary` → Table (per-stop detail, top 100 by delta)
- `ds_inferred_dwell_summary` → Table (VP-inferred, top 100 by p90)

See **Inferred Dwell Heatmap** tab for time-of-day patterns.

widget.name: txt_heatmap_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## VP-Inferred Dwell — Time of Day Heatmap

Dwell time inferred from vehicle position haversine proximity (≤40m, speed ≤1 m/s). Accuracy: ±30 seconds. Hours in Phoenix local (UTC-7).

**Source:** `gold_stop_dwell_inferred` — independent of GTFS-RT predictions; derived purely from vehicle movement evidence.

**Global filters** (route_id + service_date) are linked to all three datasets on this tab.

**Widget 1 — Route × Hour Heatmap** (`ds_inferred_heatmap_route`)
- Chart type: Heatmap
- X: `phoenix_hour` (0–23), Y: `route_id`, Color: `avg_dwell_sec` (aggregation: AVG)
- Color ramp: Custom Sequential — light yellow (#fff9c4) → orange (#ff7043) → red (#b71c1c)
- Reveals which routes have sustained dwell inflation at specific hours (rush hour vs off-peak)

**Widget 2 — Top Stops × Hour Heatmap** (`ds_inferred_heatmap_stop`)
- Chart type: Heatmap
- X: `phoenix_hour`, Y: `stop_name`, Color: `avg_dwell_sec` (aggregation: AVG)
- Same color ramp as Widget 1
- Shows top 40 stops by avg dwell ≥60s — pinpoints chronic problem stops and their peak hours
- Select a single route for a focused view

**Widget 3 — Daily Dwell Trend** (`ds_inferred_dwell_trend`)
- Chart type: Line
- X: `service_date` (no transform), Y series 1: `avg_dwell_sec` (AVG), Y series 2: `p90_dwell_sec` (AVG)
- Series: `route_id` — shows if dwell is trending up, down, or stable over 30 days
- Select 1–3 routes for a readable chart; fleet-wide will overlap too many lines

**Interpretation notes:**
- Dwell ≥120s at non-terminal stops = likely wheelchair boarding or oversized passenger load
- Persistent dwell at the same stop across multiple days = candidate for schedule padding review
- Spikes on a single date = one-off event (incident, weather, special event)
- Route A/ALEX terminal stops may show high values — expected layover behavior

widget.name: txt_trip_profile_header
widget.textbox_spec:
## VP-Inferred Dwell — Trip Profile

Shows dwell by stop sequence along a route (profile) and individual trip × stop breakdown (matrix). Select a **single route + direction** for meaningful results. Terminal stops (first/last per trip) are excluded.

**Widget 1 — Route Stop Profile** (`ds_route_stop_profile`)
- Chart type: Bar
- X: `stop_name`, Y: `avg_dwell_sec` (AVG) — optional second series: `p90_dwell_sec`
- Sort by `stop_sequence` ASC (not alphabetical) — this preserves route order
- Shows avg dwell per stop aggregated across 7 days. Pattern to look for:
  - Inflation concentrated at specific stops = boarding demand or infrastructure issue at that stop
  - Inflation building progressively = schedule compression (bus running late, rushing through stops)
  - Flat profile with one spike = incident or recurring event at that location

**Widget 2 — Trip × Stop Heatmap** (`ds_trip_stop_heatmap`)
- Chart type: Heatmap
- X: `stop_sequence`, Y: `trip_id`, Color: `dwell_seconds` (AVG)
- Color ramp: Custom Sequential — #fff9c4 (light yellow) → #b71c1c (deep red), min=30, max=300
- Shows yesterday's data. One row = one trip. One column = one stop position.
- A red column = one stop affecting every trip (stop-level problem)
- A red row = one trip that ran badly all day (vehicle or operator issue)
- A red block = a combination of bad stop + bad time window

**Filter tip:** Link route_id and service_date global filters to both datasets on this tab.
